articles.title: Thailand becomes first country to enforce 21-day Ebola quarantine
articles.description: Thailand has implemented a mandatory 21-day quarantine for travelers from the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda due to the Ebola outbreak. This measure, effective May 27, 2026, applies to those who have traveled from or passed through these nations within the last 21 days. The move aims to bolster disease control, with strict penalties for non-compliance.

articles.title: CMRL money laundering probe: ED searches ex-Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan’s residence, daughter-linked firm
articles.description: The Enforcement Directorate conducted searches at 10 premises, including the rental house of former Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan, in connection with a money laundering case. The investigation centers on allegations of an illegal payment of Rs 1.72 crore by CMRL to Vijayan's daughter's company, Exalogic Solutions, for services not rendered.

articles.title: China 'Backstabs' India Again? Beijing Backs Pakistan On Kashmir, Calls For UNSC Resolution
articles.description: China has done it again. Even as Beijing publicly talks about improving ties with India after years of border tensions and the Galwan clash, it has once again sided openly with Pakistan on Kashmir. In a fresh joint statement with Islamabad, China backed Pakistan’s position and called for a resolution under the UN Security Council framework — directly challenging India’s long-standing stand that Kashmir is strictly a bilateral issue. This is not diplomacy. This is strategic signalling. From CPEC running through Pakistan-occupied Kashmir to China arming Pakistan with missiles, submarines and fighter jets, Beijing’s double game is now impossible to ignore. While China talks trade and stability with Delhi, it continues helping Pakistan militarily and diplomatically against India. So can India really trust Beijing again? Or is China simply using diplomacy to keep India distracted while strengthening Pakistan behind the scenes? This report breaks down Beijing’s latest betrayal and the growing trust deficit.

articles.title: ‘Except Israel’: The two words printed in every Pakistani passport that Trump now wants gone
articles.description: Every Pakistani passport carries a printed restriction banning travel to Israel. Trump is now pushing Islamabad to join the Abraham Accords. The two positions cannot legally coexist.

articles.title: ‘Combat With Loved Ones’? Pete Hegseth Roasted AGAIN After Painfully Awkward Arlington Speech Moment
articles.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is facing fresh online mockery after an awkward verbal stumble during his Memorial Day speech at Arlington National Cemetery went viral. Critics brutally roasted the former Fox News host over what many called a Freudian slip, while others revived memories of his infamous “Pulp Fiction verse” controversy from last month. The embarrassing moment unfolded during a solemn ceremony attended by Donald Trump, JD Vance, and military officials, and social media wasted no time reacting.

articles.title: 'IRAN WON'T BEND, STOP DREAMING!': U.S. Diplomat's Brutal Reality Check To Trump | WATCH
articles.description: As Donald Trump's plan to exert maximum pressure on Iran to push it toward a peace deal is yet to find any success, a former US envoy has somewhat given a reality check to the US President on the stalement. Robert Malley, who serve as Joe Biden's special envoy to Iran, argued that Washington fundamentally misunderstood Iran by believing extreme pressure could force the country to abandon what it sees as a core national principle and sovereign right. Malley said Iran’s leadership feared being “tricked again” after past negotiations and stressed that national dignity and political values cannot simply be crushed through economic hardship or force. He compared the issue to how the United States would react if pressured to surrender values it considered sacred.#DonaldTrump #Iran #RobertMalley #USIranWar #MiddleEastWar #MiddleEastconflict #NuclearDeal #IranNuclearProgram #Geopolitics #USPolitics #BreakingNews

articles.title: Amid 'Don 3' row, Ranveer Singh seeks blessings at Chamundeshwari Temple as 'Kantara' mimicry case CLOSED
articles.description: Ranveer Singh quietly visited Chamundeshwari Temple on Tuesday morning, a day after FWICE announced a non-cooperation directive over his 'Don 3' exit. Wearing a mask, he spent 10 minutes praying before being recognised. Singh's spokesperson cited "dignity, maturity and mutual respect" as reasons for his silence on the controversy.
